introSection: Timber Twister is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Gilroy Gardens in Gilroy, California, USA. It opened in 2001, along with Quicksilver Express.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train was designed to resemble a snake.

fullText:
Timber Twister is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Gilroy Gardens in Gilroy, California, USA. It opened in 2001, along with Quicksilver Express.



Red track and unpainted supports.

The train was designed to resemble a snake.
